title: bot: from field not validated as PubId
description: In dispatcher.rs (lines 30, 35, 50), the 'from' field from DeliverParams/WhisperDeliverParams is used directly in BotEvent without validation. Per CLAUDE.md section 6: 'Never trust a PubId sourced directly from a wire message field.' An attacker could send from='' and the bot would create MessageReceived/PaymentRequest events with untrusted data. Correct: validate from is 64-char lowercase hex before creating any event.
